idea-plugin.name: Column Sorter
idea-plugin.description:
Sort and restore query result columns in DataGrip.

Overview

Column Sorter adds convenient actions for reordering columns directly in the Result Grid toolbar.

Key Features

  • Sort columns alphabetically (A-Z)
  • Restore the original column order
  • Keep pinned columns grouped first
  • Correctly handle multiple queries executed from the same console
  • Use toolbar actions or invoke commands via Find Action

Getting Started

  1. Run a query in DataGrip.
  2. Open the tabular Result Grid.
  3. Use Sort Columns A-Z to sort visible columns.
  4. Use Restore Original Column Order to return to the initial order.

Settings

Open File | Settings | Column Sorter

  • Show or hide toolbar buttons
  • Configure pinned column names
  • Enable pinned columns to stay first during sorting

Notes

The plugin changes only the visual order of columns in the Result Grid. It does not modify SQL queries, database schema, or stored table structure.
idea-plugin.change-notes:
0.1.0

  • Added alphabetical sorting for result grid columns
  • Added restore of the original column order
  • Added support for pinned columns
  • Added handling for multiple queries executed from the same console
  • Added plugin settings and toolbar integration
